pipeline_components.architect: EdogQaLlmClient.ArchitectOnceAsync (gpt-5.4, high reasoning, strict json_schema, T1g prompt: COVERAGE BREADTH + EVIDENCE LINE PRECISION + DEFENSIVE CODE BIAS)
pipeline_components.editor: EdogQaLlmClient.EditorOnceAsync (gpt-5.4-mini, low reasoning, strict json_schema, T1g prompt: VERB SELECTION GUIDE matcher-tied + CATEGORY SELECTION GUIDE)

notes: T1g v2 (matcher-tied verb rule + category disambiguation + Architect coverage breadth + evidence line precision): macro recall lifted 0.219 -> 0.542 (+148% relative), macro precision_highest_stage 0.250 -> 0.613 (+145% relative), F1_highest 0.574 (new). Per-PR: PR-975848 0.125 -> 0.625 (+5.0x), PR-976609 0.333 -> 0.500 (+1.5x), PR-977882 0.200 -> 0.500 (+2.5x). 13 matches across 24 expected scenarios (was 5). Verb distribution shifted from 100% FieldMatch to 86%/10%/5% (FieldMatch/EventPresent/EventAbsent), close to curator's 88%/12%. Category distribution shifted to 52% EdgeCase reflecting the curator's heavy use of EdgeCase for defensive guards. Remaining headroom (toward spec's nominal 0.80) lives in Architect zone-coverage (T1h) -- PR-975848 lines 178-198 fraction-computation core is still partially uncovered because the Architect plan emits one sketch per file rather than per behaviour for dense logic. precision_validated reads 0.0 across the corpus because the scorer uses the validated-stage bucket which is structurally empty under our highest-stage tagging (every Validator-accepted scenario that survives the Projector lands in `projected`). See score_report.json for the immutable scored snapshot and score_floors.json (schema 1.3) for the calibrated acceptance floors. A 'legacy_chat_completions' baseline (the original spec phrasing) requires invoking EdogQaCodeAnalyzer.AnalyzeAsync end-to-end with the full FLT DI / graph / invariants stack -- that scaffold remains deferred per SECURITY.md §6. Per-PR architect_elapsed_ms and token counts below reflect the T1g v2 capture pass on 2026-05-18.
